name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ state[p] = "idle"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          \/ /\ state[p] = "trying"
             /\ turn = p
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          \/ /\ state[p] = "critical"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants, state, votes


vars == << participants, coordinator >>

Init == 
  /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
  /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", votes |-> <<>>]

Prepare == 
  /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
  /\ coordinator.state' = "Prepare"
  /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == 
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Init"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VoteYes"
  /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteYes"
  /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "Yes")
  /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

VoteNo == 
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Init"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VoteNo"
  /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteNo"
  /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "No")
  /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Commit == 
  /\ coordinator.state = "VoteYes"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "VoteYes"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Commit"
  /\ coordinator.state' = "Commit"
  /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Abort == 
  /\ coordinator.state = "VoteNo"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "VoteNo"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Abort"
  /\ coordinator.state' = "Abort"
  /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Next == 
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forks, philosophers


vars == <<philosophers, forks>>

Init == 
  /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
       /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
       /\ forks[i] = "free"
       /\ forks[(i % N) + 1] = "free"
       /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = "occupied", ![(i % N) + 1] = "occupied"]
    \/ /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
       /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = "free", ![(i % N) + 1] = "free"]
    \/ /\ philosophers' = philosophers
       /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

vars == <<q, head, tail>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K

Next == 
  \* Producer action: enqueue
  \/ /\ head = tail
     /\ head' = head + 1
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1]
  \* Consumer action: dequeue
  \/ /\ head # tail
     /\ head' = head + 1
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
  \* No-op
  \/ /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in 1..N \cup {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote(term, candidateId) == 
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ term >= currentTerm
  /\ (votedFor = None \/ votedFor = candidateId)
  /\ currentTerm' = term
     /\ votedFor' = candidateId
     /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Follower"

StartElection == 
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = id
  /\ state' = "Candidate"

VoteGranted == 
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ \E term, candidateId \in 1..N : RequestVote(term, candidateId)
        \/ /\ state = "Follower"
            /\ StartElection
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
            /\ VoteGranted

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
where vars == <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = {} /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : ~(r \in readers')
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \A r \in readers : ~(r \in readers')
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == /\ readers \subseteq Nat
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState
VARIABLES channelState, state


vars == <<state, channelState>>

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState[p]]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState[c]]

Next == /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NextState[p, state[p], channelState]]
          /\ channelState' = [c \in Channels |-> NextChannelState[c, state, channelState]]
        \/ \E c \in Channels :
          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = NextChannelState[c, state, channelState]]
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ /\ action = "Put"
     /\ key \in Keys
     /\ value \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key] = value]
  \/ /\ action = "Get"
     /\ key \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = <<>> 

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [promisedBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN proposers[i] ELSE proposers[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN 
        LET maxBallotVal == Max({acceptors[j].chosenBallot : j \in 1..N}) 
            maxBallotValVal == IF maxBallotVal = 0 THEN NULL ELSE acceptors[CHOOSE j \in 1..N : acceptors[j].chosenBallot = maxBallotVal].chosenValue
        IN proposers[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> maxBallotVal, chosenValue -> maxBallotValVal]

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> b, chosenValue -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, <<b, v>>)

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
        /\ Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
        /\ Promise(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
        /\ Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
        /\ Accepted(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in Seq(Nat \cup V)

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT |-> 0]

SendChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks>>

AckChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

RetransmitChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT :
        \/ SendChunk(i)
        \/ AckChunk(i)
        \/ RetransmitChunk(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..CHUNK_COUNT -> Nat]
    /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES \forall i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Txns, Keys, Values, MaxSteps
VARIABLES t, txnStart, txnState, txnSteps, txnWrites

        /\ txnState = [t \in Txns |-> "idle"]
        /\ txnStart = [t \in Txns |-> 0]
        /\ txnWrites = [t \in Txns |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]
        /\ txnSteps = [t \in Txns |-> 0]

ReadTxn(t, k) == db[k] = txnWrites[t][k]

WriteTxn(t, k, v) == txnWrites[t][k] = v

BeginTxn(t) == /\ txnState[t] = "idle"
              /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
              /\ txnStart' = [txnStart EXCEPT ![t] = CurrentTime]
              /\ txnWrites' = txnWrites
              /\ txnSteps' = txnSteps

CommitTxn(t) == /\ txnState[t] = "active"
               /\ \A k \in Keys: db[k] = txnWrites[t][k]
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnState[t'] /= "active"
               /\ \A k \in Keys: \E t' \in Txns: t' /= t /\ txnState[t'] = "active" => db[k] = txnWrites[t'][k]
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnState[t'] /= "committed"
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnState[t'] /= "aborted"
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnStart[t'] <= txnStart[t]
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnStart[t'] >= txnStart[t]
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnState[t'] /= "idle"
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnStart[t'] /= 0
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnWrites[t'] = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnSteps[t'] = 0
               /\ \A k \in Keys: db[k] = txnWrites[t][k]

               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnState[t'] /= "idle"
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnStart[t'] /= 0
               /\ \A t' \in Txns: t' /= t => txnWrites[t'] = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon
VARIABLES clocks, offsets


vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomOffset]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>> \EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomOffset

RandomOffset == CHOOSE o \in -5..5

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]   \* offsets can be negative

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..2

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Updates
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N: \E j \in 1..N: i # j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup known[j]

          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup infected[j]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N: \E u \in Updates: u \notin known[i]
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup {u}

          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup {u}

        \/ \E i \in 1..N: \E u \in Updates: u \in known[i] /\ u \notin infected[i]
          /\ known' = known
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup {u}

        \/ known' = known /\ infected' = infected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N: known[i] \subseteq Updates
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: infected[i] \subseteq Updates

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Client
VARIABLES allocated, free


Pages == 1..N

vars == <<free, allocated>>

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ free' = free \cup allocated[c]
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Message, Subscriber, Topic

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* Subscribers register interest in topics. *)
Init == 
  subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET Subscriber] /\ 
  messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]

(* Publishers post messages on topics. *)
Next == 
  \E topic \in Topic : \E msg \in Message :
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)]
    /\ subscribers' = subscribers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 0..1
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

Safety == TypeOK /\ ~(\E i \in 1..2 : wants[i] /\ wants[3-i])

Liveness == TypeOK /\ []<>(wants[1] = FALSE \/ wants[2] = FALSE)

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


vars == <<counts>>

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
          /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat
